Agar biror bir jismga vertical ravishda 50 N kuch ta`sir qilsa, jism gorizantal ravishda qancha metr masofaga ko`chadi?

Tebranish chastotasi 0.001 Hz bo`lgan jism 100 marta tebranish uchun qancha vaqt sarflaydi?

X=20sin(0.04t) harakat tenglamasiga ega mayatnikning tebranish chastotasini toping?(Hz)
